subscriptionExpiredBody: Your school subscription has expired. Grace period is active. Some features may be limited soon. Please contact Super Admin or complete the payment.
subscriptionExpiringBody: Your subscription ends in {{days}} days. Please renew on time to avoid interruptions.
statsFilterDesc: Choose period for student and teacher cards.
admissionsChartDescription_3m: Last 3 months: totals by calendar month.
admissionsChartDescription_1y: Last year: totals by quarter — typical for private-school reporting.
admissionsChartEmpty: No data points for this range.
admissionsChartNoData: Statistics are not available. Try refreshing the page.
admissionsChartFooterHint: Areas show aggregated counts (not daily). Departures: inactive/graduated or deletion of an active student.
schoolManagerLoginMessage: Please login as school manager first.

students.title: Students
students.description: Manage student and parent accounts in your school.
students.baseDescription: View and manage the school student base.
students.attachDescription: Enter information to assign a student to a class.

parents.createLoginDescription: Create a parent account for an existing student here.

face.title: Face ID attendance
face.description: Look at the camera and click "Mark attendance". The system recognizes the face and marks the student present.
face.cameraDenied: Camera could not be opened. Please allow access.
face.modelLoadFailed: Face ID models failed to load.
face.notDetected: Face not detected. Look straight at the camera.

profilePhoto.title: Profile photo (Face ID attendance)
profilePhoto.description: Upload or delete your profile photo. It is used by the Face ID attendance system.

profile.requiredFields: First Name and Email are required.

studentPhoto.title: Student photo: {{name}}
studentPhoto.description: Upload or delete the profile photo for Face ID attendance.

confirm.deleteTimetable: Are you sure you want to delete this timetable entry?
confirm.deleteTeacher: Are you sure you want to delete this teacher?
confirm.deleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

schedule.title: Timetable
schedule.description: View, create, edit, and delete timetable by class.
schedule.watchMode: Watch mode is enabled: all class timetables are shown in one place. Select a specific class to add or edit.
schedule.selectClassToView: Select a class to view timetable.
schedule.empty: No timetable entries for selected class yet.
schedule.noLessonsThisDay: No lessons planned for this day.

exams.title: Exams and management
exams.description: Set exam dates, publish them, and monitor results.
exams.resultsEmpty: No attempts found for this exam yet.

analysis.title: Class result analysis
analysis.selectClass: Select a class to view analysis.
analysis.selectSpecificClass: Select exactly one class to see analysis cards.
analysis.subject: Subject
analysis.noClassGrades: No grades for this class yet.
analysis.noStudentGrades: No student grades for this class yet.
analysis.studentSubjectsDesc: Shows this student's results by subject.

ui.noAnalysisForClass: No analysis found for the selected class.
ui.studentsListHint: This section is for search only.
ui.attachStudentHint: Enter details to attach a student to class.

alertsMessages.noClasses: No classes have been created yet. First add a class in the 'Classes and Subjects' section.
alertsMessages.noTeachers: No teachers are registered at school yet. You can add them in the 'Users' section.
alertsMessages.noParentAccounts: Parent accounts have not been created for students yet. They will be needed for notifications.
alertsMessages.noSchoolAdmin: School admin has not been created yet. Adding a school_admin is recommended for daily operations.
alertsMessages.attendanceIssue: Attendance needs attention in class {{className}}: {{absentCount}} absences, {{lateCount}} late arrivals.
alertsMessages.noClassData: There is not enough grade or attendance data for class {{className}} yet.
alertsMessages.debtorStudents: {{count}} students have outstanding debt. Highest debt: {{studentName}}.
